title: Operational Bulletins 2020 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2020
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 668: Special measures to expedite urgent travel related to Ukraine International Airlines flight PS752 (Expired) January 16, 2020

## All operational bulletins (by year)
